name: evez-self-awareness
description: EVEZ OS Self-Awareness Loop -- autonomous gap detection, capability building, and system evolution. Runs every 6h. Reads system state, identifies missing pipelines and broken integrations, builds new autonomous loops to fill gaps. Each run increments a generation counter.
author: EvezArt

inputs.name: system_state
inputs.description: Current EVEZ OS system state including connected APIs, active loops, and known gaps

outputs.name: gaps_found
outputs.description: List of identified capability gaps with priority and build action

outputs.name: gaps_built
outputs.description: List of capabilities built this run
